title: 🎃Allhallows ~ Halloween
description: A Halloween decoration mod that adds monsters, costumes, and decor.
body:
![Allhallows Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f87cc8a07757cfd7ea2679635acaf149014d13.png)
# 🎃Allhallows – A Spooktacular Minecraft Experience

Step into the spirit of Halloween with Allhallows, a mod that brings the magic, mischief, and mystery of the spookiest season to your Minecraft world! From eerie new mobs to hauntingly cute creatures and festive decorations, Allhallows transforms your game into a playground for tricks, treats, and terror.
- Meet the Pumpkling – A mischievous little pumpkin creature that follows you through the night, reacting to players in curious ways and adding life to your haunted landscapes. Tame with torches.
- Ghosts - Creatures that roam the night.
- Candy Corn Delight – Sweet treats, perfect for collecting… if you dare!
- Hauntingly Fun Decor – Transform your builds with Halloween-themed props and seasonal charm.
- Costumes - Craft yourself some costumes using the new Spinning Wheel and cloth!
  
## 📝 Getting Started
Use the advancements. All mod progression is described in the advancement tab.

## ⚒️ Mod Loaders
Built for Fabric or NeoForge. 


Whether you’re crafting a haunted mansion, exploring mysterious forests, or just want a touch of Halloween magic in your world, Allhallows delivers monsters, mischief, and memorable moments.
Get ready for a spooktacular adventure… if you’re brave enough!

![Pumpkling Entity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94fe31b78502c54d5ff53ae20aceda2657f0d7b2.png)
